lex.title: Lex AI
lex.subtitle: Your intelligent load advisor
lex.premium_only: Lex AI is available on Premium + AI plan
lex.note_error: ❌ Could not save note. Try again.
lex.greeting: Hi! I'm Lex, your load advisor. Ask me about any route, rate or market.
lex.no_profile: I don't have enough data yet. Save a few loads first so I can learn your patterns.
lex.error_api: Connection error. Try again in a moment.
lex.load_calculated_hint: Load calculated. Click on me if you want my recommendation.
lex.analyzing_route: Analyzing a route in this zone.
lex.reason_financial_risk: Financial risk: RPM of ${{rpm}} is ${{diff}} below your operational survival line (${{min}}/mi). Accepting this means paying to work.
lex.reason_excellent_opp: Excellent opportunity: This load performs {{pct}}% better than your consolidated historical average of ${{avg}}/mi.
lex.reason_solid_load: Solid load: The rate meets your usual standard (${{avg}}/mi). This is a safe route to maintain your profit margin.
lex.reason_caution: Caution: The rate is {{pct}}% below your average. Try to negotiate at least ${{avg}}/mi to make the route worth it.
lex.reason_good_zone: Good zone: Historically you've done very well in {{state}}, and this offer beats the average of your {{count}} previous loads there.
lex.reason_zone_warning: Zone warning: Keep in mind the rate offered is below what you usually get going to {{state}} (${{avg}}/mi).
lex.reason_stable_zone: Stable zone: The rate aligns with the profitability you've shown on your last {{count}} loads to {{state}}.
lex.reason_exploration: Exploration zone: I don't have enough data on your profitability in {{state}} yet (only {{count}} previous loads). Log this load's result so I can learn more.
lex.reason_new_territory: New territory: You've never logged a load ending in {{state}}. Make sure to review return metrics before jumping into this new zone.
lex.reason_short_under100: ⚠️ Short load ({{miles}} mi) — Routes under 100 miles need at least $150 flat. This load pays ${{total}} — doesn't cover the time invested.
lex.reason_short_100_150: ⚠️ Short load ({{miles}} mi) — For 100–150 mile routes you need at least $2.50/mi. This load pays ${{rpm}}/mi — consider negotiating.
lex.reason_short_150_200: ⚠️ Short load ({{miles}} mi) — For 150–200 mile routes you need at least $2.00/mi. This load pays ${{rpm}}/mi — evaluate if it's worth your time.
lex.analysis_prompt: Click the quick action buttons to analyze:
lex.feedback_placeholder: Tell us what happened or what you'd like to see...
lex.feedback_note: Your feedback helps us improve the app
lex.feedback_error: Error submitting feedback. Please try again.

lex.hover_bubble: Click to see detailed analysis of the current section
lex.error_processing: There was an error processing your question. 😕
lex.logic_not_connected: My logic isn't connected yet, but I can already read your messages. 😉

landing.hero_desc: Calculate real costs, analyze routes, and make smart decisions before accepting a load.
landing.pain_title:
How much are you losing
by not calculating correctly?
landing.pain_1: You accept loads that don't cover your real expenses
landing.pain_2: You keep your books on paper or in your head
landing.pain_3: You don't know which routes are actually profitable
landing.pain_4: You waste time calculating instead of driving
landing.solution_sub: Make decisions based on real data, not gut feelings
landing.feat1_desc: RPM, earnings, and costs in under 30 seconds
landing.feat2_desc: Revenue, expenses, and profitability in one place
landing.feat3_desc: Discover which states generate the most profit for you
landing.feat4_desc: 96+ loads organized and exportable to Excel
landing.s4_desc:
Enter origin, destination, and rate — instantly know whether the load is worth it or not.

RPM, empty miles, tolls, fuel. All calculated automatically with automatic decision.
landing.s5_desc: Every trip recorded automatically. Filter by origin, destination, or month. Export everything to Excel for your taxes or analysis.
landing.s6_desc: Full control of revenue vs expenses. See your real profit month by month, record all your expenses, and measure your operating efficiency at 94.2%.
landing.s7_desc:
Interactive U.S. map that colors each state by its real profitability based on your history.

🟢 Green = over $1.05 RPM  |  🟡 Yellow = $0.75–$1.05  |  🔴 Red = under $0.75
landing.s8_desc:
Your intelligent co-pilot available 24/7. Analyzes every load, predicts profitability, and gives you recommendations based on your real history.

Only available on the Premium + AI Plan.
landing.s9_desc: Customize the app 100% to your operation. Vehicle type, real fixed costs, home state. Everything pre-configured so the calculations are exactly yours.
landing.results_sub: Carriers already using Smart Load Solution
landing.results_quote: "Before I accepted loads that seemed good but ended up losing money. With SmartLoad I know in 30 seconds if it's worth it."
landing.cta_sub: Join hundreds of carriers already making smarter decisions
landing.cta_price_desc: 50 loads with no credit card • Pro Plan from $19/mo
landing.features_heading: Everything You Need in One Place
landing.features_sub: Professional tools designed specifically for independent carriers
landing.fc1_desc: Enter load details and get your real Revenue Per Mile in under 30 seconds. Accounts for total miles, deadhead, fuel, and operating costs.
landing.fc2_desc: Lex AI learns from your previous loads and recommends better routes and profitable zones.
landing.fc3_desc: Visualize on an interactive map which states and routes have been most profitable for you.
landing.fc4_desc: Complete dashboard with key metrics: total revenue, expenses, net profit, average RPM, and monthly trends. Export reports to Excel for your accounting.
landing.fc5_desc: All your loads saved, editable, and exportable. Never lose track of your work.
landing.pricing_sub: Start free. Upgrade whenever you want more power.
landing.plan_starter_tagline: Perfect for getting to know the platform
landing.plan_premium_tagline: 🚀 Pays for itself with 2-3 better optimized loads
landing.pricing_roi: Is it worth it? If you optimize just 2-3 loads per month and avoid accepting bad loads that cost you money, the Pro Plan pays for itself. Most of our users report +$300-500/mo in additional profit.
landing.testimonials_sub: Carriers earning more with data-driven decisions
landing.t1_quote: "Before I accepted loads that seemed good but ended up losing money. With SmartLoad I now know in seconds if it's worth it. My profit increased almost 30% in 2 months."
landing.t2_quote: "The zones map changed my game. Now I can clearly see which states give me the most profit and avoid wasting time on bad routes. The $19 pays for itself every month."
landing.t3_quote: "Simple, fast, and effective. I no longer waste time calculating by hand. Lex AI recommends the best routes based on my history. Indispensable tool."
landing.footer_tagline: The intelligent platform for carriers who want to maximize their earnings with data-driven decisions.

about.hero_sub: Our mission is to empower independent carriers with smart tools to maximize their profitability and make informed decisions.
about.story_p1: Smart Load Solution was born from real experience on the road. As independent carriers, we faced the same challenges you do: deciding which loads to accept, calculating real costs, and maximizing every mile driven.
about.story_p2: Tired of using spreadsheets and doing rough mental math, we decided to build a tool that would let us make decisions based on real data, not gut feelings.
about.story_p3: Today, Smart Load Solution is the trusted platform for hundreds of carriers looking to take their business to the next level with data intelligence and real-time financial analysis.
about.val1_desc: We believe in absolute transparency. No surprises, no fine print. You know exactly what you pay and what you get.
about.val2_desc: Every second counts on the road. Our tools are designed to give you accurate answers in seconds, not minutes.
about.val3_desc: We're not a tech company that's never touched a steering wheel. We're carriers who built the tool we needed.
about.diff1_desc: Calculate real profitability in under 30 seconds before accepting any load.
about.diff2_desc: Dashboard with key metrics: revenue, expenses, profit margin, and monthly trends.
about.diff3_desc: Identify which states and routes generate the most profit based on your real history.
about.diff4_desc: Save, edit, and export all your loads to Excel/CSV for tax reports or analysis.
about.cta_sub: Join hundreds of carriers already making better decisions with Smart Load Solution.
about.cta_fine: ✓ No card required • ✓ Setup in <2 min • ✓ Cancel anytime
about.footer_tagline: Smart load intelligence for the modern carrier.
about.footer_copyright: © 2026 Smart Load Solution. All rights reserved.

blog.hero_sub: Strategies, analysis, and tips for expediters who want to earn more.
blog.feat_title: How to Calculate Your Real RPM (And Why Brokers' Numbers Are Wrong)
blog.feat_desc: The RPM brokers give you doesn't include deadhead, wait time, or your real vehicle costs. Here's how to calculate your true cost per mile and why it makes a difference on every load.
blog.a1_title: The 5 Most Profitable Zones for Expediters in 2024
blog.a1_desc: Real RPM data analysis by region and which zones give the best return in high-demand months.
blog.a2_title: Expenses Every Expediter Forgets to Calculate
blog.a2_desc: From preventive maintenance to self-employment taxes: the complete list of expenses that affect your bottom line.
blog.a3_title: How to Decide in 30 Seconds If a Load Is Worth It
blog.a3_desc: The quick decision flow used by the most successful expediters to accept or reject loads without hesitation.
blog.a4_title: LLC vs Sole Proprietor for Expediters: What's Right for You
blog.a4_desc: Tax advantages, asset protection, and insurance requirements based on your legal structure as an independent carrier.
blog.newsletter_sub: We're working on new content every week. Create your account to get notified.

faq.hero_sub: Everything you need to know about SmartLoad Solution.
faq.a1: SmartLoad Solution is a professional platform designed for cargo van expediters. It lets you calculate the real RPM of each load, identify profitable zones, track your expenses, and make data-driven financial decisions — all from your phone or computer.
faq.q2: Do I need technical experience to use it?
faq.a2: No. SmartLoad is designed for expediters, not engineers. The interface is intuitive and you can calculate your first load in under 5 minutes.
faq.q3: Does it work on iOS and Android?
faq.a3: Yes. SmartLoad is a Progressive Web App (PWA) that works on any device with a modern browser. You can install it on your phone directly from the browser, no App Store or Google Play required.
faq.a4: Yes. The Starter plan is completely free and includes the RPM calculator, basic profitability analysis, and load tracker. No credit card required.
faq.q5: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faq.a5: Yes. No contracts or long-term commitments. You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings and will retain access until the end of your paid period.
faq.q6: What's the difference between Professional and Premium?
faq.a6: Professional includes modules 1–6 with advanced financial analysis. Premium includes all modules (1–8) plus full access to Lex AI, the smart assistant that analyzes your loads in real time. See the plans page for a detailed comparison.
faq.a7: Yes. We use Google's Firebase for data storage with encryption in transit and at rest. We never sell your information to third parties. See our Privacy Policy for more details.
faq.q8: Can I access from multiple devices?
faq.a8: Yes. Your account syncs in real time across all your devices. Calculate from your phone on the road and review your finances from your computer at home.
faq.cta_sub: Our support team is ready to help you.

support.hero_sub: Have a problem or question? Tell us and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

refund.hero_sub: 14-Day Risk-Free Guarantee. Your satisfaction is our priority.
refund.guarantee_body: We are so confident you'll love Smart Load Solution that we offer a complete 14-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked.
refund.guarantee_p2: If for any reason you are not satisfied with your subscription, you can request a full refund within the first 14 days from your first payment. No explanations needed.
refund.sec1_yes: ✅ You qualify for a refund if:
refund.sec1_li1: You are within the first 14 days from your first payment
refund.sec1_li2: You have a Professional ($14.99/mo) or Premium + AI ($29.99/mo) subscription
refund.sec1_nli1: More than 14 days have passed since your first payment
refund.sec1_nli2: A previous refund was already processed on your account
refund.sec1_nli3: Your account was suspended for violating the Terms of Use
refund.sec2_step1_desc: Send an email to support@smartloadsolution.com with the subject "Refund Request"
refund.sec2_step2_desc: Include your registration email so we can locate your account quickly
refund.sec2_step3_desc: You will receive a confirmation of your request within 24 hours
refund.sec2_step4_desc: The refund will be processed within 3-5 business days to your original payment method
refund.sec4_li2: Your account will move to the Starter plan (free)
refund.sec4_li3: Your data will be kept for 30 days in case you decide to return
refund.sec4_li4: You can resubscribe at any time
refund.sec5_cancel_desc: You stop future charges. You keep access until the end of the paid period. No refund of remaining time.
refund.sec5_refund_desc: We return 100% of your payment. Your subscription is cancelled immediately. Only available in the first 14 days.
refund.contact_p: We're here to help. Don't hesitate to contact us:
refund.contact_response_desc:
Usually within 24 hours
Monday to Friday: 9AM – 6PM EST

privacy.hero_sub: Your privacy is important to us. Here we explain how we handle your information.
privacy.intro_p1: At Smart Load Solution, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy describes what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding it.
privacy.intro_p2: By using our application, you accept the practices described in this policy.
privacy.sec1_li1: Email: To create your account and authenticate
privacy.sec1_li4: Saved loads: Information about your trips and calculations
privacy.sec1_li8: IP address: For security and fraud prevention
privacy.sec2_c1_desc: Calculate profitability, save your data, sync across devices
privacy.sec2_c2_desc: Answer your questions, send important updates
privacy.sec2_c3_desc: Protect your account, prevent fraud and suspicious activity
privacy.sec2_c4_desc: Analyze usage, improve features, fix bugs
privacy.sec3_banner: ✅ We do NOT sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.sec3_li1: Service Providers: Firebase (Google) for authentication and database
privacy.sec3_li2: Legal Compliance: If required by law or to protect our rights
privacy.sec3_li3: With Your Consent: In any other circumstances with your explicit authorization
privacy.sec4_intro: We implement security measures to protect your information:
privacy.sec5_li1: Keep your session active: So you don't have to log in every time
privacy.sec5_li3: Analyze usage: To improve the app (if Firebase Analytics is enabled)
privacy.sec5_tip: 💡 You can disable cookies in your browser, but this may affect app functionality.
privacy.sec6_r1_desc: Request a copy of the information we have about you
privacy.sec6_r3_desc: Permanently delete your account and all your data
privacy.sec6_r4_desc: Download your information in CSV format
privacy.sec7_p1: We keep your information while your account is active. If you delete your account:
privacy.sec7_li1: Your data is permanently deleted within 30 days
privacy.sec7_li3: We may retain information if required by law
privacy.sec8_desc: This application is intended for users over 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect information from minors. If we discover we have collected data from a minor, we will delete it immediately.
privacy.sec9_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy occasionally. We will notify you of important changes through:
privacy.sec9_li3: Updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this page
privacy.sec10_intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or want to exercise your rights, contact us:

resources.hero_sub: Guides, tutorials, and practical tips to maximize your profitability on the road.
resources.academy_desc: Learn to think like a profitable operator with our structured learning system
resources.g1_desc: Learn to correctly calculate your Revenue Per Mile including all hidden costs and operating expenses.
resources.g2_desc: Discover which states and regions offer the best profit margin and how to avoid zones with unprofitable loads.
resources.g3_desc: Proven techniques to negotiate with brokers and get rates that are truly worth it for your operation.
resources.g4_desc: How to read your financial metrics, identify trends, and use data to make better decisions.
resources.g5_desc: Quick guide to set up your account, enter your first load, and start using Smart Load Solution.
resources.g6_desc: Tips to reduce fuel, maintenance, and other costs without affecting service quality.
resources.faq_q1: Do I need a credit card for the free plan?
resources.faq_a1: No. The free plan gives you 50 loads without needing to enter any payment method. Just create your account and start using it immediately.
resources.faq_q2: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
resources.faq_a2: Yes, you can cancel anytime from your settings panel. No contracts or penalties. Once cancelled, you keep access until the end of the already paid period.
resources.faq_a3: Absolutely. We use Firebase (Google Cloud) for storage, with end-to-end encryption. Your financial data is private and we never share it with third parties.
resources.faq_q4: Does it work on my phone?
resources.faq_a4: Yes. Smart Load Solution is a 100% responsive Progressive Web App (PWA). It works on any device: iPhone, Android, tablet, or desktop computer.
resources.faq_q5: What happens if I exceed the 50 free loads?
resources.faq_a5: You'll receive a notification when you approach the limit. You'll still be able to view your history and access the dashboard, but you'll need to upgrade to the Pro Plan to add more loads.
resources.faq_q6: Can I export my data to Excel?
resources.faq_a6: Yes. Pro Plan users have unlimited export to Excel and CSV from any section (history, finances, zones).
resources.s1_desc: Send us your questions and we'll respond within 24 hours.
resources.s2_desc: Pro users receive priority responses within 12 hours.

resources.cta_fine: ✓ No card • ✓ Setup in <2 min • ✓ Cancel anytime
